headline: S&P Global Lending Tech Launch Tests Valuation And Private Credit Ambitions
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) has launched DataXchange and AmendX, two lending technology platforms for private credit and syndicated loan markets. The tools introduce AI powered document management and a fully digital amendment lifecycle for lenders and agents. The launch targets manual, fragmented workflows in loan operations and aims to support compliance and efficiency needs. S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) is best known for its credit ratings, indices and data services, and has been building out...
